song.title: What A Wonderful Savior
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C V6 C
song.lyrics: [V1] 1) Christ has a full redemption made: What a wonderful Savior! We are redeemed! the price is paid: What a wonderful Savior! [C] Chorus What a wonderful Savior is Jesus my Savior; What a wonderful Savior is Jesus my Lord! [V2] 2) I praise Him for the cleansing blood, What a wonderful Savior! That reconciled my soul to God, What a wonderful Savior! [V3] 3) He cleansed my heart from all its sin: What a wonderful Savior! And now He reigns and rules therein; What a wonderful Savior! [V4] 4) He dwells within me day by day, What a wonderful Savior! And keeps me faithful all the way, What a wonderful Savior! [V5] 5) He gives me overcoming power, What a wonderful Savior! And triumph in each trying hour, What a wonderful Savior! [V6] 6) To Him I’ve given all my heart, What a wonderful Savior! The world shall never share a part, What a wonderful Savior!
